about.title: The WoodHub story
paragraphs: WoodHub started from a small woodworking shop in Tan Binh, where one founder's family has worked in the timber trade for two generations. We saw well-made, carefully crafted products struggle to reach customers beyond a few familiar streets.
Meanwhile, furniture buyers often struggled to picture how a piece would look in their own home, or wanted something custom-made but didn't know where to start.

WoodHub was created to connect both sides: a platform where Vietnamese workshops can showcase their products, take bulk orders from businesses, and receive custom design requests — while customers can shop, design their own pieces, and preview them at home with AI and AR/3D.
about.illustrationQuote: From a workshop in Tan Binh
about.illustrationDesc: to a platform connecting hundreds of workshops with customers nationwide.

values.title: Real wood, clear origin
values.desc: Every product on WoodHub comes from a workshop verified for capability and materials — no fake wood, no unclear sourcing.

values.title: Standing with Vietnamese craftsmen
values.desc: We build tools that help small workshops reach a wide customer base, instead of only doing contract work for big brands.

values.title: Technology for a real experience
values.desc: AI advice and AR/3D previews help customers picture a product in their own space before ordering.
